label: Muertos y Desaparecidos
contestNote: Rettig documented 2,279; later updates and ongoing investigations raised total to ~3,216. Human rights groups estimate higher.

label: Presos Políticos Est. (1973–1990)
source: Amnesty International; Vicaría de la Solidaridad
contestNote: Estimate across the entire period; regime denied any systematic imprisonment. Valech recognized 40,018 with sufficient testimony.

label: Chilenos Forzados al Exilio
source: UNHCR; Vicaría de la Solidaridad archives
contestNote: Figures range from 100,000 to 400,000 depending on definition of 'political exile'.

label: Financiamiento Encubierto de EE.UU. para Desestabilizar a Allende
source: Church Committee Report (1975); US State Dept FOIA
contestNote: Church Committee documented $8M in covert funding 1970-73. Actual total may be higher; some operations remain classified.

label: Detenidos en el Estadio Nacional (Sep 1973)
contestNote: Estimates range from 7,000 to 12,000+ in the weeks immediately following the coup.

label: Sitios de Detención/Tortura de la DINA Conocidos
Víctimas de la Caravana de la Muerte
Casos Penales contra Pinochet al Morir
Caída del PIB en 1975 (Terapia de Shock)
